goal: Add a client portal to Unite-Hub where clients can log in, see their projects, and message us.
routing_note: No 'unite-hub' entry exists in .harness/projects.json; routed to the matching portfolio entry 'unite-group' (CleanExpo/unite-group, team UNI). Move m1 must confirm this or register a distinct unite-hub entry before tickets are filed.

win_condition.statement: Client can register/be invited, log in, log out, reset password via Supabase Auth (not a hand-rolled table).
win_condition.probe: integration test: invite -> login -> session readable -> logout

win_condition.statement: Every authenticated client maps to one or more client accounts/orgs via stored membership.
win_condition.probe: query returns exactly one account per test client

win_condition.statement: Row-level isolation enforced: a client reads only their own data; cross-tenant reads impossible at DB layer.
Authenticated client sees their projects with status, and only theirs.
win_condition.probe: test: client A sees only A's projects

win_condition.statement: Two-way messaging: client sends to staff and reads replies; staff read and reply from CRM; threads tenant-scoped.
win_condition.probe: test: client send creates scoped row; staff reply lands in same thread

win_condition.statement: New messages appear to recipient without manual refresh (Realtime/poll-on-focus).
Notifications fire: staff on new client message, client on staff reply (email minimum).
Auth and message-send routes are rate-limited and reject after a threshold.
Audit trail records auth events and message sends with actor, timestamp, tenant.
win_condition.probe: row appears in portal_audit after a logged action

win_condition.statement: A client account cannot reach any staff/admin route or staff-only data.
win_condition.probe: authz test: client hits staff route -> 403

win_condition.statement: End-to-end integration test drives invite -> login -> view projects -> send -> reply -> logout.
Observability shows portal logins, message volume, error rate.
win_condition.probe: panel shows non-null data after e2e run

win_condition.statement: Operator runbook exists for locked-out client, can't-log-in triage, and revoking an offboarded client.
File-share (client doc upload/download) is explicitly in-scope or explicitly deferred.
Data-retention, message-deletion, and PII handling for client data are defined and applied.

moves.title: Confirm project routing & scope guardrails
moves.deliverable: Written confirmation Unite-Hub == unite-group repo (or new unite-hub registry entry); file-share (wc14) and privacy (wc15) decisions captured.
moves.verify: projects.json resolves the target repo/Linear; wc14 and wc15 marked decided.

branches.decider: Phill: is client file-share in scope?
Phill: is client file-share in scope?

moves.title: Auth schema + tenant model migration
moves.deliverable: Supabase migration adding client-profile, client_account (tenant), and account_membership linking auth user -> account.
moves.verify: list_tables shows tables/columns; migration runs idempotently.

moves.title: Supabase Auth wired (register/invite + login + logout)
moves.deliverable: Working auth via Supabase Auth from the portal; session cookie issued.
moves.verify: Integration test logs a user in and reads the session.

moves.title: Password reset flow
moves.deliverable: Request-reset and confirm-reset paths.
moves.verify: Test: request -> reset token issued -> password changes.

moves.title: RLS policies for tenant isolation
moves.deliverable: Row Level Security on every client-readable table keyed to account_membership.
moves.verify: Test attempts cross-tenant read -> 0 rows.

moves.title: Client->tenant linkage enforced & seeded
moves.deliverable: Each client mapped to their account; staff tool/seed to set the mapping.
moves.verify: Query returns exactly one account per test client.

moves.title: Project data model exposed to clients
moves.deliverable: project rows carry an owning account_id; a client-scoped read view.
moves.verify: Schema check + RLS denies other accounts.

moves.title: My-projects client read endpoint + page
moves.deliverable: Authenticated client sees their projects with status.
moves.verify: Test: client A sees only A's projects.

moves.title: Session validation middleware + role guard
moves.deliverable: Middleware rejects unauthenticated requests and blocks client tokens from staff routes.
moves.verify: Authz test: client hits staff route -> 403.

moves.title: Rate limiting on auth + send routes
moves.deliverable: Limiter on login/reset/message-send.
moves.verify: Burst test trips the limit.

moves.title: Audit logging table + writes
moves.deliverable: portal_audit table; auth events and message sends recorded with actor/tenant/timestamp.
moves.verify: Row appears after a logged action.

moves.title: Messaging schema (threads + messages, tenant-scoped)
moves.deliverable: Migration for message_thread + message, RLS-scoped to account.
moves.verify: Schema check + cross-tenant read denied.

moves.title: Client message send + read surface
moves.deliverable: Client can send to staff and read replies.
moves.verify: Test: client sends -> row exists, scoped to account.

moves.title: Staff-side reply surface (CRM)
moves.deliverable: Staff read client threads and reply from the internal CRM.
moves.verify: Test: staff reply lands in the client's thread.

moves.title: Realtime message delivery
moves.deliverable: Supabase Realtime subscription so new messages appear without refresh.
moves.verify: Subscription test receives an insert event.

moves.title: Notification fan-out (email)
moves.deliverable: Email to staff on new client message and to client on reply.
moves.verify: Enqueue test fires on send.

moves.title: Error, lockout & empty states
moves.deliverable: Handled states for failed login, lockout after limit, send failure, empty project/message lists.
moves.verify: Tests assert each state renders/returns correctly.

moves.title: End-to-end integration test
moves.deliverable: One test: invite -> login -> view projects -> send -> reply (realtime) -> logout, with a lockout assertion.
moves.verify: The test passes in CI.

moves.title: Observability panel + metrics
moves.deliverable: Dashboard panel / log queries for portal logins, message volume, error rate.
moves.verify: Panel shows non-null data after the e2e run.

moves.title: Operator runbook + offboarding path
moves.deliverable: Runbook for locked-out client, can't-log-in triage, and revoking an offboarded client (membership removal + session revoke).
moves.verify: Dry-run of offboarding removes access; removed user's cross-tenant read denied.

risks.risk: UI ships before RLS -> cross-tenant data leak.
risks.response: RLS hard-gated before any client read path; cross-tenant-read test is the gate.

risks.risk: Messaging ships one-directional (no staff reply surface).
risks.response: Staff reply is its own move, not folded into the client surface.

risks.risk: Realtime not wired -> feature needs manual refresh, feels broken.

risks.response: Revocation path is a first-class move with a verification dry-run.

risks.risk: Silent failure in prod (logins/messages failing unnoticed).
risks.response: Observability panel for logins, message volume, error rate.

risks.risk: Routing ambiguity (unite-hub vs unite-group) files tickets in the wrong Linear project.
risks.response: Confirm routing or register a unite-hub entry before any ticket is filed.
